subject: 🍁 🔥 Gravel 2020 Rolling Papers - SOLD OUT 🔥 🍁
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **PENTAGON PAPERS -_SOLD OUT_**
---
| | [ ](https://mikegravel.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=a3b6e90d58&e=85f7472d66)
---
4/20 is over and we've ~~smoked~~ sold all of our Pentagon Papers. Thanks to everyone who helped us celebrate the holiday.

Don't feel too bad if you missed out on this piece of history — we'll have more merch coming soon.

name: Team Beto
subject: We’re writing to ask for your help to meet this moment. Trump just set a fundraising record for an incumbent president. We need the resources to compete.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
We will be heavily outspent. Donald Trump just set a record for an incumbent president at this stage in the cycle by reporting $40 million in cash on hand. His campaign is fueled by big money donors and PACs. Just last week, he held fundraising events in Texas that brought in millions including checks from big donors. We can’t underestimate his chances at holding the White House.

#
We’ve already accomplished amazing things in a short amount of time. But now we need to rise to meet this moment.
**We will be heavily outspent.** Donald Trump just set a record for an incumbent president at this stage in the cycle by reporting $40 million in cash on hand. His campaign is fueled by big money donors and PACs. Just last week, he held fundraising events in Texas that brought in millions including checks from big donors. We can’t underestimate his chances at holding the White House.
This campaign is different. It’s ALL people. Not a dime from PACs, corporations, or special interests. That’s why we need your help. We rely on online fundraising to compete -- that means people like you, reading emails like this one, contributing what you can.
[Can Beto count on you to contribute $3 now so we have the resources to take on Trump? If everyone reading these emails gives a little bit, we can overcome any challenge thrown our way.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17427?refcode=ema20190421-28270&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=28270%2E444211%2Eb2Ri8m)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17427?refcode=ema20190421-28270&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=28270%2E444211%2Eb2Ri8m)**
Here’s just a bit of what we’ve already accomplished:
* **Beto has visited more towns and cities than any other candidate** to talk and listen to real people about the ways we can move our country forward.
* **We broke a record in grassroots support** on the first day of the campaign.
* **Volunteers organized events in every state and territory** during Beto’s launch rally.
* **We’ve launched a full-scale, 50-state voter contact program.** No other presidential campaign has started a program to talk to voters this quickly.

All of these efforts are funded by your contributions. From $5 to $50, it all helps.
[Chip in $3 to Beto today to make sure our campaign has the resources to reach every voter. Let’s prove that together, we’ve got the determination, heart, and sheer numbers to challenge a president with vast resources -- _and win._](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17427?refcode=ema20190421-28270&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=28270%2E444211%2Eb2Ri8m)
Our best shot at changing the course of our country is all of us coming together at this moment, for something greater than ourselves.
Now let’s get after it -- with all of our strength.
Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=28270%2E444211%2Eb2Ri8m). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Election-Update@protectvoting.org
subject: SENATE ALERT: Roy Moore is SURGING in the polls!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - **Peter -- this is bad:** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d077b/72412298/447a8f21/6101493d/1120463705/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9zcGxpdF9qb25lcyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMTkwNDIxX0RlZmVuZEpvbmVzX1UxX1gyIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_split_jones?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&tandembox=show&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2") Sen. Doug Jones made HISTORY in 2017 when his grassroots team defeated Republican Roy Moore and flipped Alabama's Senate seat blue for the first time in decades. And as a senator, Jones has been a fierce advocate for voting rights in a state with a record of voter suppression, especially with voters of color. **[Jones won by just 1.5 points in 2017; but he's in danger of losing his seat. Pitch in today so we can boost Jones's campaign and keep a voting rights champion in the Senate. >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d077b/72412298/447a8f21/6101493c/1120463705/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9zcGxpdF9qb25lcyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMTkwNDIxX0RlZmVuZEpvbmVzX1UxX1gyIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_split_jones?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&tandembox=show&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Jones+won+by+just+15+points+in+2017+but+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2")** | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d077b/72412298/447a8f21/6101493f/1120463705/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9zcGxpdF9qb25lcyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMTkwNDIxX0RlZmVuZEpvbmVzX1UxX1gyIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_split_jones?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&tandembox=show&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2")

---
In 2017's special election, Republicans made it their mission to suppress voters and keep Alabama's Senate seat red -- even if it meant supporting accused child molester Roy Moore.
Moore in office means strict voter ID laws with DMV closures throughout the state, major purges of voters from the rolls (even for those who had voted in the previous election or had not moved) -- the list goes on and on.
**And this is all in addition to Moore 's history of predatory behavior. We can't let him anywhere near the US Senate.**
**[Help us fight back by pitching in now -- every dollar donated will go toward holding this critical Senate seat and fighting to defend voting rights.>>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d077b/72412298/447a8f21/61014925/1120463705/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9zcGxpdF9qb25lcyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMTkwNDIxX0RlZmVuZEpvbmVzX1UxX1gyIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_split_jones?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&tandembox=show&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+Help+us+fight+back+by+pitching+in+now++e&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2")**
Now's our chance to make a difference,
Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d077b/72412298/447a8f21/61014924/1120463705/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=10+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2")
---
| | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---
If you'd like to support the Voter Protection Project, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d077b/72412298/447a8f21/61014927/1120463705/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=11+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d077b/72412298/447a8f21/61014926/1120463705/VEsHBw/ "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=12+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d077b/72412298/447a8f21/61014929/1120463705/VEsHBg/ "https://voterprotect.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=13+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_190421_DefendJones_U1_X2")

name: Cory Booker
subject: Checking in from the road
body:
| | |
---
| Team, we've been criss-crossing the country on our Justice for All tour -- and I'm so grateful to hear your stories, concerns and ideas for this country **and talk about our shared vision for a fairer, more just America.** We kicked off the Justice for All tour in Iowa -- where I met fellow Queen fans and shared my favorite live performance of "Bohemian Rhapsody" by Queen, Elton John, and Axl Rose in 1992. [](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-roundup-em?refcode=em_fr_20190421_CB_20190421-fr-CB-roundup-actives_actives_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Gboi blew me away with her introduction at a rally in Des Moines. She is a fifth grader in Iowa who will be changing her community for years to come. Proud to have her on this team. [](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-roundup-em?refcode=em_fr_20190421_CB_20190421-fr-CB-roundup-actives_actives_i2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Next stop: Atlanta. It was great to be back in the city that my parents called home for over twenty years. Thank you to the student leaders and activists who hosted me for a necessary discussion on voting rights and reproductive justice. Together, we will bring that fight to the White House. [](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-roundup-em?refcode=em_fr_20190421_CB_20190421-fr-CB-roundup-actives_actives_i3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Important note: Atlanta knows how to do vegan food. I had a ridiculously amazing vegan burger. [](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-roundup-em?refcode=em_fr_20190421_CB_20190421-fr-CB-roundup-actives_actives_i4&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") And we just left Nevada, where I met new folks in Reno, Carson City, and rural communities before heading to Las Vegas. Thank you to everyone who showed up to discuss the big challenges our nation faces, everyone who is worried about the direction of this country -- and rightfully so. We have work to do, team, but I know we can do this; when we channel our common pain into common purpose, that's how we make change and that's how change in this country has always been made. [](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-roundup-em?refcode=em_fr_20190421_CB_20190421-fr-CB-roundup-actives_actives_i5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Friend, every single dollar funds this movement and keeps our campaign competitive in the primary. Chip in whatever you can today: _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _[](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-roundup-em?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20190421_CB_20190421-fr-CB-roundup-actives_actives_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

[](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-roundup-em?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=em_fr_20190421_CB_20190421-fr-CB-roundup-actives_actives_expresslane35&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

[](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-roundup-em?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20190421_CB_20190421-fr-CB-roundup-actives_actives_expresslane50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

[](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-roundup-em?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20190421_CB_20190421-fr-CB-roundup-actives_actives_expresslane100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

[](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-roundup-em?refcode=em_fr_20190421_CB_20190421-fr-CB-roundup-actives_actives_expresslaneother&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")_ Together, Cory
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76f2/5fca0d19/1a2c9be3/291a9d56/395595450/VEsHBA/ "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76f2/5fca0d19/1a2c9be3/291a9d55/395595450/VEsHBw/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76f2/5fca0d19/1a2c9be3/291a9d54/395595450/VEsHBg/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76f2/5fca0d19/1a2c9be3/291a9d53/395595450/VEsHAQ/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76f2/5fca0d19/1a2c9be3/291a9d52/395595450/VEsHAA/ "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76f2/5fca0d19/1a2c9be3/291a9d56/395595450/VEsHAw/ "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: re: I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important: Will you make your first donation to our campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Elizabeth doesn't scoop up big checks from wealthy donors at private fundraising events, and she doesn't take a dime from PACs or federal lobbyists. | | |
---
**[Yesterday, Elizabeth asked if you could make your first contribution to our campaign.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fc68/45c30650/b4d48839/669737b6/4195900894/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNDIxZW0xLXYxczEifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190421em1-v1s1")**

It would make a huge difference because we rely on grassroots donations to fund this campaign. She doesn't scoop up big checks from wealthy donors at private fundraising events, and she doesn't take a dime from PACs or federal lobbyists.

**Thank you for being on this team. Can you answer Elizabeth 's call and chip in for the first time to own a piece of our movement?**

**[https://my.elizabethwarren.com/april-fundraising](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fc68/45c30650/b4d48839/669737b9/4195900894/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiMjAxOTA0MjFlbTEtdjFzMSJ9/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/april-fundraising?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190421em1-v1s1")**

Thanks,

Team Warren
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fc68/45c30650/b4d48839/669737b6/4195900894/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNDIxZW0xLXYxczEifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190421em1-v1s1")
---

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Elizabeth Warren** <info@elizabethwarren.com>
Date: Sat, Apr 20, 2019
Subject: I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important: Will you make your first donation to our campaign?
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
There's only one way we're raising money for this campaign.

I'm not holding any fundraisers where you can only get in by writing a big check -- because a person's wealth shouldn't determine the amount of time they can spend with me -- or any presidential candidate.

I'm not counting on a billionaire to fund a Super PAC for me -- because the Democratic primary can't just be one more plaything for the rich and powerful.

I'm not taking a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind -- because our campaign is about people, not powerful special interests.

**Instead, we're building a true grassroots campaign with grassroots donors -- because that's the only way we'll create a movement strong enough to make big, structural change in our economy, our government, and our democracy.**

**[I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important: Will you make your first donation to our campaign? $3 or whatever you can chip in would make a huge difference. I can't do this without you.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fc68/45c30650/b4d48839/669737b6/4195900894/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNDIxZW0xLXYxczEifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190421em1-v1s1")**

On a typical presidential campaign, my team would be flying me from big city to big city to scoop up as many big fat checks as possible.

Wealthy donors might come see me at fancy receptions in hedge fund offices. They'd sip champagne, nibble on shrimp cocktail, and try to convince me that the tax loophole that just so happens to pad their pockets is also good for the whole country.

But I'm not running to be a president who only pays attention to the wealthy and well-connected.

I'm running to be everybody's president. My time is not for sale, and every supporter has an equal place in our movement.

Instead of getting cozy with the rich and powerful, I'm in New Hampshire this weekend for meet-and-greets and organizing events. Anyone's welcome to come -- no big check required.

If you ask me, that's what a campaign for president should be all about. Talking with everyday Americans, in their hometowns, about real solutions to real problems. Getting organized at the grassroots level to make change happen. Having conversations with school-teachers, bus operators, McDonald's workers (hello, Logan in Idaho!), and anyone who gives a little at a time.

But this type of campaign is only possible if everyone who is able pitches in what they can.

I'm running to be the best president that money can't buy, but I can't do it alone. This is how we'll stop Washington from just answering to the beck and call of billionaires and giant corporations -- one grassroots donation at a time.

**Without the backing of wealthy donors, I truly need your help to make sure the ideas we care about continue to be part of the national conversation.**

**[Please make your first contribution to own a piece of this campaign. Let's build something incredible together.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fc68/45c30650/b4d48839/669737b6/4195900894/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNDIxZW0xLXYxczEifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190421em1-v1s1")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

[**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fc68/45c30650/b4d48839/669737b6/4195900894/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNDIxZW0xLXYxczEifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190421em1-v1s1")

clean_body: Elizabeth doesn't scoop up big checks from wealthy donors at private fundraising events, and she doesn't take a dime from PACs or federal lobbyists. | | | "" It would make a huge difference because we rely on grassroots donations to fund this campaign. She doesn't scoop up big checks from wealthy donors at private fundraising events, and she doesn't take a dime from PACs or federal lobbyists. Thank you for being on this team. Can you answer Elizabeth 's call and chip in for the first time to own a piece of our movement? "" Thanks, Team Warren | "" \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Elizabeth Warren <info@elizabethwarren.com> Date: Sat, Apr 20, 2019 Subject: I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important: Will you make your first donation to our campaign? To: dpwillis67@gmail.com There's only one way we're raising money for this campaign. I'm not holding any fundraisers where you can only get in by writing a big check -- because a person's wealth shouldn't determine the amount of time they can spend with me -- or any presidential candidate. I'm not counting on a billionaire to fund a Super PAC for me -- because the Democratic primary can't just be one more plaything for the rich and powerful. I'm not taking a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind -- because our campaign is about people, not powerful special interests. Instead, we're building a true grassroots campaign with grassroots donors -- because that's the only way we'll create a movement strong enough to make big, structural change in our economy, our government, and our democracy. "" On a typical presidential campaign, my team would be flying me from big city to big city to scoop up as many big fat checks as possible. Wealthy donors might come see me at fancy receptions in hedge fund offices. They'd sip champagne, nibble on shrimp cocktail, and try to convince me that the tax loophole that just so happens to pad their pockets is also good for the whole country. But I'm not running to be a president who only pays attention to the wealthy and well-connected. I'm running to be everybody's president. My time is not for sale, and every supporter has an equal place in our movement. Instead of getting cozy with the rich and powerful, I'm in New Hampshire this weekend for meet-and-greets and organizing events. Anyone's welcome to come -- no big check required. If you ask me, that's what a campaign for president should be all about. Talking with everyday Americans, in their hometowns, about real solutions to real problems. Getting organized at the grassroots level to make change happen. Having conversations with school-teachers, bus operators, McDonald's workers (hello, Logan in Idaho!), and anyone who gives a little at a time. But this type of campaign is only possible if everyone who is able pitches in what they can. I'm running to be the best president that money can't buy, but I can't do it alone. This is how we'll stop Washington from just answering to the beck and call of billionaires and giant corporations -- one grassroots donation at a time. Without the backing of wealthy donors, I truly need your help to make sure the ideas we care about continue to be part of the national conversation. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116
